title: Review round 1: wolfhsm API polish
notes: Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — key-handle leak without Drop is the highest-frequency user issue; RSA and ML-DSA self-oracle tests violate test integrity and set a bad precedent; MlDsaKey::level public mutable field is a correctness trap that will fossilize as API; nvm_write auto-assign returns no ID. No memory-safety or hostile-input issues found.
